Document:
# Guard Commander
The Guard Commander leads the Guard department. They set patrol routes, coordinate responses to threats, and make authoritative judgments on crimes that require rank above a standard Guard. The Commander's cloak is a mark of authority recognized throughout the settlement.
## Responsibilities
- Lead and organize the Guard department - Set patrol routes and priorities for Guards and the Investigator - Make authoritative decisions on arrests and punishments - Respond to serious threats alongside Guards - Report major incidents to the administration
## Requirements
[bold]3 hours[/bold] in the Guard department. Salary: [bold]200 coins[/bold] per cycle.
Your arrival as Guard Commander is announced to the administration.
## Tips
- Brief your Guards at the start of the round — assign zones and tasks early - A visible Commander builds morale among the Guard and deters criminals - Work closely with the [bold]Investigator[/bold] on complex cases - Use [textlink="Combat" link="OE14Combat"] as your combat reference
